objective.value: Reduce new-rep ramp time by 30% by Q4

action_items.notes: Objectives: cut new-rep ramp time, lift win rates, improve forecast accuracy. Success criteria to be defined. Recommended based on the customer's needs: 30% faster ramp, +5pt win rate, forecast within 10%.
Agreed evaluation path: committee demo, shortlist to two, 2-week trials, committee vote, final approval.
SOC 2 under review with their infosec team
POC scope drafted, awaiting Champion sign-off
Procurement freeze until new fiscal year; confirming timing
